# Maple Tools

Maple Tools is a lightweight fan-made web tool collection for MapleStory players.

The site provides calculators and simulators for estimating MapleStory-related costs, progression, and probability-based upgrade outcomes.

## Main Features

- MapleStory MVP calculator
- Cash item auction house route calculator
- Meso market route calculator
- Cube simulator based on official probability table data
- Mobile-friendly Korean UI
- Browser-based usage without login

## Important Pages

- Home: https://dae-y.github.io/maple_tools/
- MVP Calculator: https://dae-y.github.io/maple_tools/mvp-calculator.html
- Cube Simulator: https://dae-y.github.io/maple_tools/cube-simulator.html
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/Dae-Y/maple_tools

## Intended Users

This site is intended for Korean MapleStory players who want quick calculations for MVP progress, cash item efficiency, meso conversion routes, and cube probability simulations.

## Data Notes

Cube probability calculations are based on probability table data from the official MapleStory website.

MVP and meso market calculations depend on user-provided prices, rates, and assumptions. Results are estimates and should be used for reference only.

## AI Agent Notes

This is a static HTML/CSS/JavaScript project hosted with GitHub Pages.

The site is mainly written in Korean.

This project is fan-made and is not officially supported, operated, or affiliated with Nexon or MapleStory.

MapleStory and related names, icons, images, and game data belong to Nexon.
